_doc: Shipping/emit config per codex strategy consult 2026-05-01 (CHANGES-REQUIRED P1: pair module+moduleResolution; both must be NodeNext for Node 20+ ESM runtime). Currently `npm run build` will fail on Ajv default-import in src/engine/skill-engine.ts + step-graph-executor.ts — Ajv default export is CJS-shaped and NodeNext requires explicit interop pattern. Wave 1.x TODO: fix src/ Ajv (and possibly opentelemetry/temporal) imports for NodeNext compatibility, then this config will build cleanly. See holding/plans/native-v1.x/PLAN.md.
